title: exacum loheri
intro: Exacum loheri, also known as the Blue Pimpernel, is a perennial plant species in the family Gentianaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Exacum loheri include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Exacum loheri are typically used in infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
